'''Shandor Squadron''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadron that carried out the attack on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] supply center [[Jyrenne Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]. Shandor Squadron suffered minimal losses during the engagement.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{1stm}}
